response: No, 22733 is not a prime number because it can be factored as 127 × 179.
reasoning_content:
We need to determine if 22733 is a prime number. Let's check for small factors.

First, note that 22733 is odd, so not divisible by 2. Sum of digits: 2+2+7+3+3=17, not divisible by 3, so not divisible by 3. Last digit is not 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. Check divisibility by 7: 7*3247=22729, remainder 4, so not divisible. 7*3248=22736, too high, so no.

Check 11: alternating sum: 2-2+7-3+3 = 7, not divisible by 11. Check 13: 13*1748=22724, remainder 9; 13*1749=22737, too high, so no. Check 17: 17*1337=22729, remainder 4; 17*1338=22746, too high. Check 19: 19*1196=22724, remainder 9; 19*1197=22743, too high. Check 23: 23*988=22724, remainder 9; 23*989=22747, too high. Check 29: 29*784=22736, remainder -3, so no; 29*783=22707, remainder 26. Check 31: 31*733=22723, remainder 10; 31*734=22754, too high. Check 37: 37*614=22718, remainder 15; 37*615=22755, too high. Check 41: 41*554=22714, remainder 19; 41*555=22755, too high. Check 43: 43*528=22704, remainder 29; 43*529=22747, too high. Check 47: 47*483=22701, remainder 32; 47*484=22748, too high. Check 53: 53*429=22737, remainder -4; 53*428=22684, remainder 49. Check 59: 59*385=22715, remainder 18; 59*386=22774, too high. Check 61: 61*372=22692, remainder 41; 61*373=22753, too high. Check 67: 67*339=22713, remainder 20; 67*340=22780, too high. Check 71: 71*320=22720, remainder 13; 71*321=22791, too high. Check 73: 73*311=22703, remainder 30; 73*312=22776, too high. Check 79: 79*287=22673, remainder 60; 79*288=22752, too high. Check 83: 83*274=22742, remainder -9; 83*273=22659, remainder 74. Check 89: 89*255=22695, remainder 38; 89*256=22784, too high. Check 97: 97*234=22698, remainder 35; 97*235=22795, too high.

We need to go up to sqrt(22733). sqrt(22733) ≈ 150.77 because 150^2=22500, 151^2=22801, so up to 151. So we need to test primes up to 151. We've done up to 97. Continue: 101, 103, 107, 109, 113, 127, 131, 137, 139, 149, 151.

Check 101: 101*225=22725, remainder 8; 101*226=22826, too high. So no.
103: 103*220=22660, remainder 73; 103*221=22763, too high.
107: 107*212=22684, remainder 49; 107*213=22791, too high.
109: 109*208=22672, remainder 61; 109*209=22781, too high.
113: 113*201=22713, remainder 20; 113*202=22826, too high.
127: 127*179=22733? 127*179 = 127*180 - 127 = 22860 - 127 = 22733. Yes! 127 * 179 = 22733. So 22733 is composite. Therefore, it is not prime.

Thus answer: no.
